title: Spectrum Diversified Ashley Tension Paper Towel Holder (Black) - Storage Organization for Kitchen Counter, Pantry, Laundry, Apartment, RV, and Bathroom
features: TRANSITIONAL COUNTERTOP STORAGE: With a transitional design and modern finishes, this paper towel holder will look beautiful in any kitchen. The Ashley Pantry Collection features clean, smooth lines and a variety of finishes to enrich your home's stylish organization.
NON-SLIP BASE: A weighted foundation keeps the holder sturdy. Rubber bumper pads prevent slip and skids against countertops.

ADJUSTABLE PIVOTING ARM: The flexible arm allows for a one-handed tear, making it easier to wipe up quick-spilling messes. After the cleaning is done, there is no need to adjust or fix the look of your roll. The arm keeps everything tidy and together.

SIMPLE REFILLING: To replenish your paper towels, lift the pivoting arm, and simply slide the empty roll off the center rod to then slide the replacement roll in place. Fits both standard and jumbo-sized paper towel rolls of any brand.
DIMENSIONS & CARE: 16.5" x 7.25" x 7.5". Wipe with a microfiber cloth.
description: For a classic, functional, modern way to store your paper towels, use Spectrum Diversified’s Ashley™ Tension Paper Towel Holder. The sturdy construction and pivoting arm make it easy to tear off a paper towel without the holder tipping or leaning. The steel will not bend, even after years of use. The round, weighted base keeps the holder vertical for stable support on tables, countertops, and bars. The easy-to-clean paper towel holder can be wiped off with a damp cloth and towel dried, so there’s no reason to worry about drips or splatters getting on the steel. Both standard and jumbo rolls of paper towels fit inside the holder, so you can choose your favorite brands with confidence. With a variety of contemporary finishes, this countertop accessory will match your kitchen décor perfectly and the durable steel will last for years.
